title: dianthus chinensis var. morii
intro: Dianthus chinensis var. morii, also known as the Chinese pink or Dianthus morii, is a variety of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is a perennial plant with fragrant flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or dried extract to harness its medicinal properties.
